shadowSentences: I love reading books at night.
Traveling teaches us about new cultures.
Cooking can be a fun way to unwind.
Listening to music helps me relax after work.
Walking in nature boosts my mood and energy.
Spending time with friends strengthens our bonds.
Learning a new language opens many opportunities.
Exercising regularly improves both physical and mental health.
Volunteering in the community can be very rewarding.

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about travel planning.
questions: Q1: Can you share a memorable travel experience you’ve had?
Q2: What challenges do you often face when planning a trip?
Q3: How do you feel about the importance of travel in life?
Q4: What tips would you give someone planning their first trip?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about environmental awareness.
questions: Q1: What actions do you personally take to help the environment?
Q2: What do you think is the biggest challenge in promoting eco-friendly habits?
Q3: In your opinion, how important is it to protect the environment?
Q4: What advice would you give to someone who wants to be more eco-conscious?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about time management.
questions: Q1: Can you describe a time when you struggled with managing your time?
Q2: What specific difficulties do you encounter when trying to stay organized?
Q3: How do you think effective time management can impact success?
Q4: What strategies would you recommend for improving time management skills?
